---
title: "Home"
---

## Senior Biostatistician

I am a senior biostatistician with experience supporting clinical, epidemiologic,
and public health research. I focus on clear study design, rigorous statistical modeling, and reproducible analysis to support reliable scientific conclusions.

I work closely with clinicians and public health researchers to translate complex data into interpretable results that inform research and practice.

#Research Background
HIV and infectious diseases, cardiovascular disease, neurology, and metabolic disorders (diabetes).

### Areas of Expertise
- Regression modeling (GLM, GLMM)
- Survival analysis
- Penalized regression (LASSO)
- Multiple imputation
- Neighborhood- and multilevel analyses

### Tools
R, SAS, Python, Quarto, Git, RShiny, Quarto, Markdown
